title: Why You Experience Time Differently Than Others

segments.text: Your brain processes time in unique ways.
And it can stretch or compress based on emotion.
Time feels faster when you're having fun.
And slower during boring or painful moments.
This is due to how memories are formed.
So, your perception makes time a personal experience.
Your brain's unique timing is a fascinating trick!
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Your brain makes time feel different. Follow for daily science & tech! ⏳
